title: agrostis stolonifera f. lutescens
intro: Agrostis stolonifera f. lutescens, also known as Creeping Bentgrass, is a type of grass that is native to temperate regions of the Northern Hemisphere. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera f. lutescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, such as salves and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
